name: Cory 2020 Campaign Manager
subject: We've got a big mid-month goal and we're going to need your help to hit it, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, it's time for an update. After Cory's debate performance last week, we need to keep up our grassroots momentum. Some of the folks he shared the debate stage with -- Kamala Harris and Joe Biden, for example -- reported huge fundraising numbers last quarter. Joe Biden's campaign announced that he raised $21.5 million from April to the end of June. That's a staggering amount of money. But here's why I'm proud of this grassroots team -- because we didn't accept any donations from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, and fossil fuel or pharma execs. Our campaign is rejecting these types of donations outright -- and it's the right thing to do. Instead, we're relying on $3, $5, and $20 contributions from supporters like you to amplify Cory's message. Team, now isn't the time to get comfortable and coast -- it's time to pick up the pace. **We 've set a fundraising goal of $100,000 -- and we need to hit it in the next week.** **[Can you donate today to help us make it happen? We're going to need all hands on deck to hit an ambitious goal like this one.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190807-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190807_C2020CM_20190807-fr-C2020CM-midmonth-actives_actives_L1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I know it sounds like a big goal but we can get it done. One thing I've learned on this campaign is when push comes to shove, this community steps up. **[So please, chip in whatever you can right now and make sure we reach our $100,000 goal by next Wednesday.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190807-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190807_C2020CM_20190807-fr-C2020CM-midmonth-actives_actives_L2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We'll be sure to update you on our progress throughout the week. It's a big goal -- but we can hit it. Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190807-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190807_C2020CM_20190807-fr-C2020CM-midmonth-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08ed/5fca0d19/e843a9f/2918e908/2911949794/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08ed/5fca0d19/e843a9f/2918e917/2911949794/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08ed/5fca0d19/e843a9f/2918e916/2911949794/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08ed/5fca0d19/e843a9f/2918e915/2911949794/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08ed/5fca0d19/e843a9f/2918e914/2911949794/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08ed/5fca0d19/e843a9f/2918e908/2911949794/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Powerful scenes from Dayton and El Paso
body:
President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump traveled today to Dayton, Ohio, and El Paso, Texas, where they met with survivors... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d60c4680bc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 7, 2019
---
| | |
# **Powerful scenes from Dayton and El Paso **

**President Donald J. Trump** and First Lady Melania Trump traveled today to Dayton, Ohio, and El Paso, Texas, where they met with survivors, families, medical workers, and first responders affected by this weekend’s horrific acts of mass violence.

**In Dayton this morning,** the two met with patients and staff members at Miami Valley Hospital. “They’ve been stopping between rooms to thank the hardworking medical staff,” Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham wrote. “Very powerful moments.”

** ****Watch President Trump:** [“We love you Dayton, Ohio!”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c22aa1be6&e=3ee4985eea)

**“You had God watching.** I want you to know we’re with you all the way,” the President said. Later in the afternoon, he and the First Lady visited with first responders, hospital staff, and victims and their families at University Medical Center of El Paso.

**As always** when tragedy strikes**,** our nation’s first responders put their own lives at risk to help save others. The men and women who answered the call in both Dayton and El Paso were no exception. On Monday, President Trump thanked those “who responded to these atrocities with the extraordinary grace and courage of American heroes.”

**Before departing** Washington today, the President pledged to push Congress on finding bipartisan solutions to address mass violence. “We’re going to be meeting with members of Congress. I’ve already got meetings scheduled. And I have had plenty of talks over the last two days,” he said. Specific measures the President has mentioned include stronger background checks, early warning detection, and “red flag” protection orders.

**“I’ll be convincing** some people to do things that they don’t want to do, and that means people in Congress,” President Trump said.

**🎬** [President Trump says he’ll work with Congress to prevent future tragedies.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d55f38f755&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **First Lady honors Purple Heart Day**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bc488fc662&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Today** is Purple Heart Day, marking the occasion 237 years ago when Gen. George Washington established the Badge of Military Merit. Washington designed that original badge by fashioning royal purple cloth into the shape of a heart.

**In the early 1900s** , Gen. Douglas MacArthur established the Purple Heart both to commemorate Washington and to revive his tradition of giving a badge to those service members who, in battle, gave an uncommon measure of devotion.

**“Melania joins me** in honoring all of our country’s Purple Heart recipients, their loved ones, and our Gold Star Families for their immeasurable sacrifice,” President Trump wrote in his official message for today. “We are forever grateful.”

[See President Trump’s message on Purple Heart Day, 2019. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f210a57db&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump meet with survivors, families, hospital staff, and first responders at Miami Valley Hospital in Dayton, Ohio**** ** | August 7, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2474832e4d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31bd934dd1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f16f1e8656)
---

---

name: Team Wilmot
subject: John Heenan endorses Wilmot Collins for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Did you see this, team? John Heenan just endorsed Wilmot Collins' campaign for Senate. Watch his endorsement below and contribute to help keep up Wilmot's momentum.

**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-heenan-video?refcode=em190807pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
\---Original Message from John Heenan---
Team,
John Heenan here. I ran for Congress last year because I believe Montanans deserve leaders who will be honest with them, fight for them, and do their best to represent their values in Washington, D.C.
I'm endorsing Wilmot Collins for Senate because I know that he will be a Senator for Montanans--not a lackey for this President, Mitch McConnell, and corporate special interests.
[**Watch my endorsement video now --then chip in $5 to Wilmot's campaign.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-heenan-video?refcode=em190807pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-heenan-video?refcode=em190807pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My work as a consumer protection lawyer has shown me that there are two sets of rules: one for the rich and powerful, and one for everyone else. In the Senate, I know that Wilmot will work to level the playing field and bring the voices of hardworking Montanans to the halls of power.
Our current Senator--Steve Daines--doesn't represent our values or our families. He's too busy doing the bidding of Mitch McConnell and corporate lobbyists. Montanans deserve better.
The stakes couldn't be higher, which is why I'm off the sidelines and all in for Wilmot. I'm asking you to please join me!
**[Check out my endorsement video, then contribute $5 to Wilmot Collins now.](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-heenan-video?refcode=em190807pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
John Heenan
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-heenan-video?refcode=em190807pm&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616478f/1e3760f0/69f0b6dd/5f7e9cbf/2277485048/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). To change your email address or update your contact info, [click here.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616478f/1e3760f0/69f0b6dd/5f7e9cbc/2277485048/VEsB/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/update-your-contact-info?source=footer") [Make a contribution now to elect Wilmot Collins as Montana's next U.S. Senator.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616478f/1e3760f0/69f0b6dd/5f7e9cbd/2277485048/VEsO/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=footer")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcedf/3eb3e2fc/5cbc7224/744bcdad/1162329240/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcedf/3eb3e2fc/5cbc7224/744bcdac/1162329240/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcedf/3eb3e2fc/5cbc7224/744bcdab/1162329240/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

subject: Will you join us?

Peter,

Access to healthcare matters. When you need it, it can save your life - and right now we need your help saving it.

**Healthcare is the number one issue for Tennesseans in BOTH political parties - yet the GOP leadership is doing nothing**.

Corruption junkies Bill Lee and Glen Casada don't care about rural hospital closures or the opioid crisis. They'd rather stick it to Obama than let Tennesseans reap any benefits from Medicaid expansion.

We need to mobilize. We need Democrats fired up and demanding change. We need to outsmart and beat the Republicans - and that means outraising them.

Will you donate today and help us win this fight?

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Don’t let them cheat their way to victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

From reducing voting booths to turning around buses full of seniors on their way to vote, to refusing to accept thousands of voter registration forms – our opponents will seemingly stop at nothing to make sure those who are in power, stay in power.

They know if they don’t tip the scales – they’ll lose.

Will you chip in just $1, $3, or even $5 right now to help me beat David Perdue and protect our right to vote?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/equal-representation?refcode=em080819-b&noskip=true]

We are fighting every day to defeat David Perdue and win back a Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate so we can restore and expand the Voting Rights Act.

We can take on the special interests and the puppet politicians they employ, we can draw fair districts, we can protect our voting booths from foreign influence - but we can only do it if we fight together to defeat David Perdue.

Join me,
-Teresa

<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/dont-let-them-get-away-with-it/]

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Two Command Coins... for two exceptional supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
Our **national press exposure has risen significantly** in the past two weeks (see links below), and our people approach in Iowa has resulted in **public polling placing us higher or tied with nearly two thirds of all the Presidential candidates who have been in the race for months to years** (link below), and I am now **turning focused attention to the Fall debate stages**.
I had kept in my bureau drawer a few of the "Command Coins” I handed to exceptional young sailors — or to leaders of nations who visited us at sea — while I led our nation's youth in harm’s way as the **Commander of the George Washington Aircraft Carrier Battle Group (and COMCRUDESGRU TWO) in war -- the highest honor I will ever be given.**
Because of what these coins mean to me in "service," I would like to present two "exceptional" supporters, each with one of my remaining "Command Coins."
I must gather 130,000 individual donors of $1 each — $1 — to mount the Fall debate stages, **I would like to give the two supporters who gather the highest number of people that each give at least $1 (more, if desired) a "Command Coin” — by midnight of Monday, August 26.**
Thank you!
**[[contribute]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8904302/86911540/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzAzY2MwMy0wN2JhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nk5Bd7W_QA_u5QHHUOpnuNRJcvB_IjhQjWp6W3DMbO4=&refcode=em08082019)**

If someone wants to hand you a dollar, that is also fine. Just record their name and address on the form provided by **[downloading the name and address sheet from my website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8904304/86911545/-171344224?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzAzY2MwMy0wN2JhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nk5Bd7W_QA_u5QHHUOpnuNRJcvB_IjhQjWp6W3DMbO4=)**.

If one collects $1 contributions in cash, mail them to the PO Box below with the lists of names and addresses; or keep the cash and mail a check for the amount made out to “Joe Sestak for President,” along with the name and address lists. Again, the names and addresses are only for having proof if asked who contributed, but are not reported to the FEC if under $200.
**The mailing address for the checks/cash and name and address lists is:**
Joe Sestak for President
P.O. Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
**Please send in all name and address lists with the contributions to be received no later than Monday, August 26** at the Post Office.

For a shorter biography: _Joe Sestak is a former 3-Star Admiral who commanded an aircraft carrier battle group in war; led the Navy's first strategic anti-terrorism unit; was President Clinton's Director of Defense Policy. He was also a Democratic Congressman representing an almost 2-to-1 Republican district, and was re-elected without spending any money on campaign ads. A man willing to stand up to even his own party’s leadership. A background that can serve us well on the Presidential debate stage._
Thank you so very much. I am more than grateful for your kind support and consideration.
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak

body:

Here at HQ, we've decorated the walls with (almost) all the things that inspire this team.

We printed out and hung every plan Elizabeth has for big, structural change. We have posters that say "Dream Big, Fight Hard" and "Persist." And who could forget photos of our favorite consumer watchdog, Bailey?

**But we kept one wall blank to add some extra inspiration. And it has your name on it -- if you want it to be there!**

_We have posters that say "Dream Big, Fight Hard" and "Persist."_
[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285295bf/45c30650/1517f47ae/6683fd8c/1247663907/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWdyYXNzcm9vdHMtZG9ub3Itd2FsbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1JMTBGX0dEV19HRFdfQ18yMDE5MDgwOF9WMVMzX1BfVDIifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-grassroots-donor-wall?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI10F_GDW_GDW_C_20190808_V1S3_P_T2")

[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285295bf/45c30650/1517f47ae/6683fd8c/1247663907/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWdyYXNzcm9vdHMtZG9ub3Itd2FsbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1JMTBGX0dEV19HRFdfQ18yMDE5MDgwOF9WMVMzX1BfVDIifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-grassroots-donor-wall?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI10F_GDW_GDW_C_20190808_V1S3_P_T2")

[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285295bf/45c30650/1517f47ae/6683fd8c/1247663907/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWdyYXNzcm9vdHMtZG9ub3Itd2FsbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1JMTBGX0dEV19HRFdfQ18yMDE5MDgwOF9WMVMzX1BfVDIifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-grassroots-donor-wall?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI10F_GDW_GDW_C_20190808_V1S3_P_T2")

The building blocks of this campaign come together without a dime from PACs, special interests, or federal lobbyists.

So we want to put the names of our grassroots donors on the walls here at HQ, because you inspire this team to keep fighting every day.

**[Can we put your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall? Donate today-- $3 or whatever you can -- and your name will be part of our headquarters.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285295bf/45c30650/1517f47ae/6683fd8c/1247663907/VEsEBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWdyYXNzcm9vdHMtZG9ub3Itd2FsbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1JMTBGX0dEV19HRFdfQ18yMDE5MDgwOF9WMVMzX1BfVDIifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-grassroots-donor-wall?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI10F_GDW_GDW_C_20190808_V1S3_P_T2")**

Thank you,

The Team at Warren HQ

| | We've got good news and bad news about the 2020 Arizona Senate race. The bad news -- McSally just emerged as THE top Republican Senate fundraiser in the nation. She's already raised $3.4 million. And with Trump and McConnell preparing to spend tens of millions to support her, she can easily raise even more. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - We've got good news and bad news about the 2020 Arizona Senate race. The bad news -- McSally just emerged as THE top Republican Senate fundraiser in the nation. **She 's already raised $3.4 million.** And with Trump and McConnell preparing to spend tens of millions to support her, she can easily raise even more. The good news -- **Multiple polls show that Mark and McSally are statistically tied.** That means Mark has a chance to pull ahead, but he needs our help to get there. **[We 've set an ambitious goal of raising $30,000 by the end of the week to help Mark pull ahead of McSally. Stand With Mark Kelly is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55.
For 2020, we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating Trump and turning Arizona blue. We recruited astronaut Mark Kelly to run for Arizona's US Senate seat, are working to win a key Arizona Congressional seat and to flip both houses of the Arizona State Legislature.
If you'd like to support the Stand With Mark Kelly Campaign, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4777/4bd7760e/4b19afbc/77e6e370/1554394350/VEsHDA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footerdmk?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=19+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190808_KellySenate_U2_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190808_KellySenate_U2_X2")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Gravel?=
subject: I've made my endorsement decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee for Peace, Justice, and Mike Gravel, a grassroots committee centered on Senator Mike Gravel
body:
Senator Mike Gravel, having (as long planned) dropped out of the race, is pleased to announce his announce his support for another candidate... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/533618a64e2f/ive-made-my-endorsement-decision?e=85f7472d66)
---
| |
---
| | **Mike Gravel Makes 2020 Endorsement Decision**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=f3081c1ded&e=85f7472d66)
---
Click here to listen to Mike make an endorsement in the 2020 race.
| We're pleased to share that Mike has made an endorsement in the 2020 race.

["I could not be more honored to officially announce that Bernie Sanders has my endorsement for President of the United States in 2020,"](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=7e14c6db8b&e=85f7472d66) Senator Gravel wrote in a letter of endorsement. "Only Bernie can build the movement that will bring sweeping change to this country and bring an end to rule by the military-industrial complex and the elites."

He stated: "The Senator is the most qualified and determined candidate to serve as President, and the only candidate who can actually win the primary, defeat Donald Trump, and vanquish the billionaire class."

In a video recorded Sunday, Mike said that "Bernie has a program that benefits all Americans, not just the one percent. He will be a great president for _all_ Americans."

"Only Bernie can build the movement that will bring sweeping change to this country and bring an end to rule by the military-industrial complex and the elites. Only Bernie can transform our country in the way we need," Senator Gravel wrote in his letter.

"I encourage everyone who, like me, wants to build a country that works for working people, to donate to Bernie’s campaign at [www.BernieSanders.com](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=64305564be&e=85f7472d66)."

Questions can be directed to Marlon Ettinger at [marlon@mikegravel.org](mailto:marlon@mikegravel.org?subject=What's%20up%3F).
---
| | | | **Paid for by the Committee for Peace, Justice, and Mike Gravel, a grassroots committee centered on Senator Mike Gravel.**

**Contributions to the Committee for Peace, Justice, and Mike Gravel are not tax-deductible. **
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

| Team -- **Great news. We just officially qualified for the fall debates. clean_body: | | | | | Team -- Great news. We just officially qualified for the fall debates. Monmouth just released a poll that has me at 2% in Iowa -- a critical state for us to build support in over the next few months. But this is just the start. We have to hire more organizers, build our team in more primary states, and run new ads to reach the critical voters we need to win in Iowa, New Hampshire, and every early primary state. We shocked everyone when we qualified today -- now let’s shock them one more time. We’re setting a $250,000 48-hour rapid response goal to match the spending of all the campaigns flooding money into Iowa and New Hampshire. Let’s go, | -Andrew | | | | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. Join the Yang Gang! If you want to get more involved and help fuel this movement, please . | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

subject: Short message for you

I’m Maya Harris, Kamala’s sister and the Chairwoman of her presidential campaign. I’m typically on the road with the team doing everything I can to support Kamala and ensure we’re building a campaign that is reflective of our values -- but we’re facing a challenge today and I thought I’d reach out and ask for your help. **Our campaign is ramping up our investments to win the early primary states like Iowa, and we’re running low on budget.** Our fundraising has apparently dipped the last few days, and in order to get back on pace, our team estimates we need at least 32 supporters from Englewood to pitch in today. So I need your help: **Will you chip in to Kamala’s campaign for president to support the work we’re doing to win this primary and replace Donald Trump with a president of, by, and for the people?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190808?refcode=ema190808-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=5900_5755789_WoAfhc&akid=5900%2E5755789%2EWoAfhc)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘You Had God Watching’
body:
President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump "met Wednesday with some of the dozens wounded or injured in the weekend mass shootings in..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=671c737097&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘You Had God Watching’**

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump “met Wednesday with some of the dozens wounded or injured in the weekend mass shootings in Ohio and Texas that left 31 dead,” Fred Lucas reports in _The Daily Signal_.

“In between visits with survivors at Miami Valley Hospital in Dayton, Ohio, the president and first lady thanked the medical staff.” While there, the President told survivors that “you had God watching. I want you to know we’re with you all the way.”

Later yesterday, “the president and first lady visited with first responders and hospital staff as well as victims and their families at the University Medical Center of El Paso.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=965145ca4c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| President Trump launched the Pledge to America’s Workers last July, a program that’s “signed on more than 20 companies and business groups, which committed to hire or train more than 3.8 million workers over the next five years. One year later, over 300 companies and organizations have joined the pledge to bring the total to over 12 million new training opportunities for students and workers over the next five years,” Sibile Marcellus writes for [Yahoo News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=898a5f4b37&e=3ee4985eea). “Among those who signed the pledge: Walmart, Microsoft, FedEx, Lockheed Martin, AT&T,” and more.
---
|
---
| “As we debate how to respond to the plague of gun violence so tragically illustrated by the weekend mass murders of 31 people in Ohio and Texas, President Trump has taken an important step by inviting social media company executives to a meeting Friday to discuss how hatred and violent extremism are fueled online,” Rabbi Abraham Cooper writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aeaa4901de&e=3ee4985eea). “Woe to us if the young and the angry are convinced they can find meaning only through hate and violence.”
---
|
---
| “The people of Venezuela continue to suffer under socialist dictator Nicolás Maduro, who is sustained by his patrons in Cuba, Russia and China. So it’s welcome news this week that the Trump Administration has toughened sanctions against the regime and its abettors,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4caf895a85&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “The new measures aim to try to cut the lifelines from Cuba, Russia and China. Sanctioned individuals will be denied entry to the U.S. The Trump Administration has morality and regional politics on its side.”
---
|
---
| In the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8075e45fa4&e=3ee4985eea) _,_ Paul Bedard reports on the unprecedented partisan media response following the tragedies in El Paso and Dayton. “This is just a sample of the shameful partisan propaganda being peddled by so-called ‘journalists,’” Media Research Center President Brent Bozell tweeted, sharing [a long list of examples.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f0ed56742&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=380c123801&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6ad9d154b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=b065fd3061)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Neil, Team Hood
subject: What matters most in Mississippi?
body:
|
---
It's official: after Tuesday's primary, Jim Hood is our nominee for governor!

**What issues matter most in Mississippi?
[Take Jim's urgent general election survey >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/44wFtQKmshlByG2CtZN9m_E_ScLfwUurErTjnUiImq4=/ToaFzJ2r6SyXoKC5mXZTnWPPX1Uqs3ipg-W25Z-FbPI=)**
Number of Questions: 6
Time to Complete: 3 Minutes
---
Friend,

It's official: after Tuesday's primary, **Jim Hood is our nominee for governor!**

Jim wants to thank you -- he couldn't have gotten this far without the help of grassroots supporters like you!

We're proud of what we've accomplished, but we still have a lot of hard work ahead. We know that Mississippi has its share of setbacks: crumbling infrastructure, too many people who can't afford health care, and public schools that aren't making the grade. **Jim has plans to address _all_ of these issues and put Mississippi families first so that our state can live up to its promise.**

But first, Jim wants to hear from people from all over Mississippi about what's most important to them so that our campaign is as strong as possible heading into the general election.

[**Take Jim 's short General Election Issues Survey now to let him know what matters most to you.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/44wFtQKmshlByG2CtZN9m_E_ScLfwUurErTjnUiImq4=/ToaFzJ2r6SyXoKC5mXZTnWPPX1Uqs3ipg-W25Z-FbPI=)

Thank you again for your support!

Neil
Team Hood

Jackson MS 39236 United States

name: Cory Booker
subject: And Andrew Yang makes nine...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, here's a quick update on the fall Democratic debates: **FIRST:** Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, Beto O'Rourke, Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren met the DNC's 130,000 individual donor and polling requirements to qualify for the fall debates. **THEN:** This grassroots team stepped up and made sure we got there too -- and I can't thank you enough. **NOW:** Amy Klobuchar and Andrew Yang just qualified for the fall debates. And Julian Castro and Tulsi Gabbard are on the cusp of getting there as well. With more and more candidates qualifying every day -- Andrew Yang just qualified this morning, bringing the number of candidates to nine -- we need to make sure this underdog campaign stands out. That's why my team raised our mid-month goal to $350,000 by August 15th. **[Will you chip in to help us amplify our campaign's message and reach this goal?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190808-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190808_CAB_20190808-fr-CAB-falldebates-actives_actives_L1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, and fossil fuel or pharma execs. name: Tim Walz
subject: Why are we waiting?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |
body:
My friend,

Yesterday, I joined hundreds of Minnesotans on the steps of our State Capitol.

As the flags waved at half-staff above us in remembrance of the lives lost to gun violence last weekend, I thought about the missed birthdays, weddings, graduations, and anniversaries. The parents who wouldn’t get another hug from their child. The spouse who wouldn’t get to hold hands with their loved one again. I thought of my son, Gus, who is the same age as the Sandy Hook students who should be starting 7th grade alongside him.

We cannot let gun violence take another life from us. We cannot let another senseless tragedy take place in our communities. We cannot sit back and do nothing.

It’s time we pass commonsense gun violence prevention measures into law.

As someone who served 24 years in the military, I know that assault weapons don’t belong in the streets of our neighborhoods. As a lifelong sportsman and avid hunter, I know that these laws to reduce senseless violence do nothing to infringe on the rights of responsible gun owners.

So to the Senate Majority: Why are we waiting for next legislative session? Let’s hold a hearing and vote on red flag laws and universal background checks this week.

Here’s the pen. I’m ready to sign it into law.

Governor Walz

Let’s get this done.

Thank you,

Tim Walz

--------------------------------------------------------
| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor |
--------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/UtxdW63DUqrq6YS0U9v9ysCDWpP6OEOFhf3cSu3GLz0=/v6K3_0lXATBQKI6w4ZHJOKdZDPNrwpS5JMU-g43TLu4=.

Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104 United States

Contributions or gifts to Tim Walz for Governor are not tax deductible. The maximum contribution for 2019-2020 is $2,000 per individual or $4,000 per couple. We cannot accept contributions from corporations or LLCs. We are prohibited by campaign finance law from accepting contributions from lobbyists and political committees during the regular legislative session. If you are a lobbyist or PAC, you received this mailing in error and we apologize for that error. We are required to collect and report the employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per year.

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: Horrifying.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS [Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
| | | | | _Please note: This email contains descriptions of gun violence and may be upsetting for some readers._
Horrifying.

That’s the only word to describe my experience at the Gilroy Garlic Festival last week.

My wife Judy and I were at the Festival in Gilroy, California when a shooter opened fire and killed 3 people while injuring many others. We weren't far from the shooter as we heard the loud “pops” and ran for safety.

Judy and I are safe ‐ thank God ‐ and we are praying for the victims, as well as all those affected by this shooting and their families. We also are very grateful for law enforcement who took quick action and to the festival staff who dealt with the aftermath.

But Gilroy isn't alone. This weekend we saw mass shootings in El Paso and Dayton. Communities and neighborhoods all across the country are suffering from gun violence and we must put an end to it.

On average 100 Americans are killed with guns every day. This number is sickening, and we can and must do more to stop the gun violence epidemic and heal as a nation.

We must strengthen and expand background checks for gun sales, fund gun violence prevention research, and ban large capacity ammunition magazines on semi-automatic assault weapons.

These aren't just bipartisan proposals, they're plain common sense.

It's time for us to take action and stop the gun violence epidemic so we can protect our communities and keep Americans safe.

It’s long overdue.

‐Dan

| |
---
_Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to**[like Dan on Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8909458/86957270/-2014048666?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjkxMjRjNy0yMWJhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJslSBzCGqNscRQpwrIT8GjfUlziTFjLbtS4ON0ommA=) **or **[follow Dan on Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8909460/86957271/-1708744047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjkxMjRjNy0yMWJhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJslSBzCGqNscRQpwrIT8GjfUlziTFjLbtS4ON0ommA=)**._

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Sign on now: Oppose the Trump-GOP immigration policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
As the humanitarian crisis that President Trump created on our border continues to spiral out of control, the Administration is trying to make it worse with new plans that would put limits on legal immigration and make it harder for migrants to seek asylum in the United States.
At the same time, Senate Republicans have blocked my proposal to grant Temporary Protected Status to Venezuelans in our country, potentially forcing them back into turmoil and chaos.
**[The Trump-GOP immigration policies are only making things worse. It's time to reverse these damaging actions and enact comprehensive reform. Sign on now if you agree.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cd1/42ab3cf4/62a4487a/135d7283/4072571822/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-on-now-oppose-the-trump-gop-immigration-policies?source=em190808&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
We need comprehensive immigration reform that secures our border while protecting Dreamers, providing a pathway to citizenship for immigrants already here, and guaranteeing that asylum seekers receive humane and compassionate care while their claims are efficiently processed.
I will keep fighting to stop the failed Trump-GOP policies that don't address the causes of this crisis or offer viable remedies to fix it. It's time for us to say enough is enough.
**[Add your name now: Join the opposition to the dangerous GOP immigration plans.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cd1/42ab3cf4/62a4487a/135d7283/4072571822/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-on-now-oppose-the-trump-gop-immigration-policies?source=em190808&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cd1/42ab3cf4/62a4487a/135d7283/4072571822/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-on-now-oppose-the-trump-gop-immigration-policies?source=em190808&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

name: McConnell Watch (via VPP)
subject: If you're not scared, you're not paying attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | The U.S. has a voting security CRISIS on its hands. Paperless voting machines are a dangerous weakness in our election infrastructure because they don't produce independent records of voters' decisions -- which means malfunctions or hacking could undetectably change votes and there'd be no way to audit the results.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **The U.S. has a voting security CRISIS on its hands:** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ff/72412298/40f45ad5/6102d52d/2230099415/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/mcconnell_safe_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1") Paperless voting machines are a **dangerous weakness in our election infrastructure** because they don't produce independent records of voters' decisions -- which means malfunctions or hacking could undetectably change votes and there'd be no way to audit the results. **That should terrify you** \-- a few compromised machines is all it takes to swing a close race. Russian hackers successfully interfered in our 2016 elections, and intelligence officials and cybersecurity experts have warned us that they'll back in 2020. [**We 've got to take action. Sign our petition to demand Mitch McConnell take immediate action to secure our elections with paper ballots!**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ff/72412298/40f45ad5/6102d52c/2230099415/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/mcconnell_safe_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Wersquove+got+to+take+action+Sign+our+pe&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1") | | | [Paper Ballots, SAFE Elections](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ff/72412298/40f45ad5/6102d52f/2230099415/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/mcconnell_safe_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Paper+Ballots+SAFE+Elections&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1")
---
In June, The House passed the SAFE Act, an election security bill that would require paper ballots and provide $775 million to help state and local governments replace their paperless machines -- _but it 's stuck in the Senate thanks to Moscow Mitch._
**Elections are at the very heart of our democracy** \-- the fate of our nation depends on whether we will take a stand against Russia and its direct assault on our election system before it's too late.
[**There 's no time -- call on Mitch McConnell to bring the SAFE ACT up for a vote NOW to safeguard our democracy!**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ff/72412298/40f45ad5/6102d52e/2230099415/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/mcconnell_safe_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Therersquos+no+time++call+on+Mitch+McCon&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1")
| | [Pass the SAFE Act NOW](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ff/72412298/40f45ad5/6102d511/2230099415/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/mcconnell_safe_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Pass+the+SAFE+Act+NOW&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1")
---
We must act now,
Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ff/72412298/40f45ad5/6102d510/2230099415/VEsA/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1")
---
| | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ff/72412298/40f45ad5/6102d513/2230099415/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ff/72412298/40f45ad5/6102d512/2230099415/VEsO/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ff/72412298/40f45ad5/6102d515/2230099415/VEsP/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190808_PaperBallots_U1_X1")

| ,

President Trump is dividing our nation like never before.

From Twitter wars, racist attacks, and an agenda bent on tearing down all progress; we're more grateful than ever that Ed Markey is fighting for our values in the Senate.

**That 's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive.** Donald Trump is coming after Ed's Senate seat. The GOP's Senate majority is in danger, and Trump and national Republicans will leave no seat unscathed this election.

We need 250 new members of Ed's campaign to pitch in before midnight. See below for your status update:

name: ALERT (via Team Baer)
subject: we're floored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Look, here's the truth:
|
---

| | The press just outed the ultra-wealthy Republicans funding the campaign of Dan's Republican opponent, Cory Gardner. Frankly, we're alarmed. **The Koch Brothers, billionaire Sheldon Adelson, George Bush, and a slew of other rich Republicans are all funneling him enormous sums of cash.**

**[We'll be blunt: We're emailing to ask you to pitch in $15 before midnight to fund Dan's grassroots campaign to take on Cory Gardner, oust Mitch McConnell, and flip the entire Senate. Even 50 grassroots gifts today will make a huge difference! >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a1268a/159389890/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190808_em_fr_b1_avtb_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

Look, here's the truth:

Nate Silver just named Colorado one of Democrats' two best pickup opportunities in the Senate.

That means our chances of taking back the Senate rest entirely on Dan's race -- _**and whether or not we can take on Cory Gardner 's massive war chest. **_

If we lose, we're looking at another two years of obstructionist Mitch McConnell running the Senate. The Supreme Court, health care, common sense gun reform... it's all on the line. So we're asking: Can we count on you to chip in $15 or whatever you can before midnight so we can defeat Dan's Republican opponent, flip the entire Senate, and oust Mitch McConnell? | | [**Donate $15 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a1268a/159389890/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190808_em_fr_b1_avtb_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $35 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a1268b/159389890/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190808_em_fr_b1_avtb_all&amount=35&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $50 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a12688/159389890/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190808_em_fr_b1_avtb_all&amount=50&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $100 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a12689/159389890/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190808_em_fr_b1_avtb_all&amount=100&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate another amount now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a1268e/159389890/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190808_em_fr_b1_avtb_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

Thanks,

Team Baer

---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a1268f/159389890/VEsB/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a1268c/159389890/VEsO/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a1268d/159389890/VEsP/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---
If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a126b2/159389890/VEsHBQ/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/fewer-emails"). We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82785/232dfd1/9e2e2fd/62a126b3/159389890/VEsHBA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe").

| | Paid for by Dan for Colorado

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: have you seen this?

body:

Friend,

If you haven’t already heard, Governor Holcomb has officially launched his re-election campaign centered around **Putting People First.**
[ **Watch: Gov. Holcomb’s re-election announcement** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8fe8a51e93b445759c77b8ef4242c70c&_e=XpYalPXosYTuTK3UXr6ZPPiRKT-3DAGlne3yjcSl9-oOTF5ViWJXVb2iFJ21Bv1TrwNXHBKlzy8SilMkSOWH2oFPbflDKlxiscZAbwNRGTcke4kvafQXbmCNrKAKAOBEZ71R8tkic9mUT3DU1v0rpEnxIZXP3JlFadwwBZ5a50H4Hic4j9sM_94NlSaPPnjtVYkA8a-XwhB-wYcPAzqtw8gJ4oZqKxx6Es-EKUcSPjDJ7eWySZGHoryTASWE4UnQ8R8_ekPgKFwgckvKwpM3ZxG9jHm_gHmORNnJA6tjMOjX7jfgRcNuU7DdHan1Gxx0VqWJNnYxwi35vYmGynauqO4BoXJ7eFxkVMqqrlQ7vuXP5DHD2xy7TAiJmqQB3eiZIIoqWoOdZj9xRz3nKfI8IJjaqvk2IR-mz7qzEljGtvCye8SPsJiYgRHbBDTqzJcy)
**Governor Holcomb’s announcement in Knightstown, Indiana, was a great kick-off for four more years of community, opportunity, and prosperity. **

Since he took office in 2017, we have seen a number of social and economic changes that have transformed the lives of Hoosiers.
[ **Learn more: watch now** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8fe8a51e93b445759c77b8ef4242c70c&_e=XpYalPXosYTuTK3UXr6ZPPiRKT-3DAGlne3yjcSl9-oOTF5ViWJXVb2iFJ21Bv1TrwNXHBKlzy8SilMkSOWH2oFPbflDKlxiscZAbwNRGTcke4kvafQXbmCNrKAKAOBEZ71R8tkic9mUT3DU1v0rpEnxIZXP3JlFadwwBZ5a50H4Hic4j9sM_94NlSaPPnjtVYkA8a-XwhB-wYcPAzqtw8gJ4oZqKxx6Es-EKUcSPjBRjp_cH-Kzs-eXVH93O8a2RLNB8OsWHIJEpqs7Lp3TzKtKAnQSoOL-l1CFghvVYgVifXBOr5G6YiC1MVYGVWGSCRMQLAInyon8eR7qsMU40nuhqixk3MxDPJweqEixL63-Q72baNIcr7Lw63Kw4d8S0ePIkINHlzbqhZYFYgyUiJxUM2vtOnJ31PMPjHqvsOAqCHJC4DQizi09AyohPhLX)
As Governor Holcomb says in the video, “Indiana has become a leader -- not just around the country, but across the globe. And it's all because of you. We've done it the right way. We've done it the Indiana Way -- by Putting People First."

Governor Holcomb’s people-oriented approach to tackling Indiana’s toughest challenges has resulted in:
* Record job growth
* Record private sector employment
* Meaningful progress in ending the opioid crisis
* Historic education funding increases
* Record road and infrastructure investments
* Tax reform
* Indiana being recognized on a global scale
* **And so much more**

**This movement has always been about Putting People First - transforming lives and creating a better, stronger Indiana for all Hoosiers to thrive. **

**And we didn’t come this far to stop now.**
[ **Hear Gov. Holcomb's plan for our future** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8fe8a51e93b445759c77b8ef4242c70c&_e=XpYalPXosYTuTK3UXr6ZPPiRKT-3DAGlne3yjcSl9-oOTF5ViWJXVb2iFJ21Bv1TrwNXHBKlzy8SilMkSOWH2oFPbflDKlxiscZAbwNRGTcke4kvafQXbmCNrKAKAOBEZ71R8tkic9mUT3DU1v0rpEnxIZXP3JlFadwwBZ5a50H4Hic4j9sM_94NlSaPPnjtVYkA8a-XwhB-wYcPAzqtw8gJ4oZqKxx6Es-EKUcSPjCpEvmXEiD4rsUZWrmFHRVxlZ9kpU0Rg5fLiQbqCy4VrOhc3lQ3SNKn4-xfkyu5i3D2LSlleIXtJ8O0BeGfJDfucn3cnwNxNi084efMKqF1Y2oPp6Y_MOJsgSgInv4XmEpFWFgUBKGHv7XyxFecl-U-Es0PzmKwAKaauEyO3AYpU1HL8v41mgikHk7YU29Wry3qvO-Dvahr7_RZ09M-8OI4)
**[If you would like to learn more about what Gov. Holcomb has in store for the next four years, watch this 2020 announcement video, and make sure to SHARE it with your fellow Hoosiers.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8fe8a51e93b445759c77b8ef4242c70c&_e=XpYalPXosYTuTK3UXr6ZPPiRKT-3DAGlne3yjcSl9-oOTF5ViWJXVb2iFJ21Bv1TrwNXHBKlzy8SilMkSOWH2oFPbflDKlxiscZAbwNRGTcke4kvafQXbmCNrKAKAOBEZ71R8tkic9mUT3DU1v0rpEnxIZXP3JlFadwwBZ5a50H4Hic4j9sM_94NlSaPPnjtVYkA8a-XwhB-wYcPAzqtw8gJ4oZqKxx6Es-EKUcSPjBErZ7b0rpXi-fZ1fFIRoIbUXPDUD_4cDUwZKr7lVxGJQea_ssWFjMaJsYuShgZIZ5Wm0AaUuhxaGvQAC8nL1Gz81yPbrPZ1r3dYd30MHVqr7tG1JKYsoY3qrDexOBTmwxE0FVyJdxfXBXgLHmL_A7tUbFQCO6vsr-ySExzM1uU3oMEzAjX2Ihl_wgLfyDGI90RLcYO1ZDbSisVh3gisnf1)**
Thank you,
Holcomb Crew

name: Wilmot for Montana
subject: Wilmot is not a millionaire, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
team, we wanted to make sure you saw Wilmot's message yesterday.
[**Wilmot is running for U.S. Senate to fight for working families, not millionaires and the special interests. But he can only get there with your support. Chip in $5 to help fund his campaign now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190808&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190808&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
\---Original Message from Wilmot Collins---
Team,
This campaign is about working families, not millionaires. I know and will fight for the interests of working people--because I am a working person. And I will always listen to you, not corporate donors or special interests.
The same can't be said for my opponent, Steve Daines, another ultra-wealthy member of Congress. He and his boss Mitch McConnell are out-of-touch millionaires who are enacting a corrupt, partisan agenda and serving the interests of their fellow wealthy elites.
[**In the Senate, I will fight for working people and work to ensure that billionaires and corporations pay their fair share. Help send me to D.C. with a $5 contribution now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190808&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
According to a 2014 article from KGVO Talk Radio, Daines' "wealth has increased substantially" while in Congress. "Average last year around $14 million, and then, this year, around $24 million."
And the Center for Responsive Politics reports that Majority Leader Mitch McConnell's net worth increased from $3 million in 2005 to a whopping $27 million in 2015.
I'm not running for office to get rich, team. I'm not going to the Senate to do the bidding of the rich, the well-connected, and the special interests. I'm running for you and all Americans.
Steve Daines and Mitch McConnell are millionaires fighting for billionaires. As your next U.S. Senator, I want to fight for you. But I need your support to help me get to Washington, D.C.
[**Montanans deserve a Senator who will stand with them, not the millionaires. I 'm ready to be that Senator. Will you chip in $5 now to help me defeat Steve Daines in 2020?**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190808&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190808&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164781/1e3760f0/69f39d07/5f7e9c3d/2616899692/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). To change your email address or update your contact info, [click here.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164781/1e3760f0/69f39d07/5f7e9c3a/2616899692/VEsB/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/update-your-contact-info?source=footer") [Make a contribution now to elect Wilmot Collins as Montana's next U.S. Senator.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164781/1e3760f0/69f39d07/5f7e9c3b/2616899692/VEsO/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=footer")

name: James Mackler
subject: Health care. Wages. Gun Violence. Climate change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
I'm sick and tired of leaders who won't show up to work for Tennesseans.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa27f/18d6a294/4b4458ca/26d66c07/4003716596/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Here's some good news: The House has advanced legislation that would:
* Protect and expand access to **affordable health care**
* Raise the **minimum wage** for the first time in 10 years
* Reduce the influence of **dark money in politics**
* Address the deadly **gun violence** epidemic
* Combat the effects of **climate change**
* Secure anti-discrimination protections for the **LGBTQ community**

But here's the bad news: **Mitch McConnell has refused to take up any of these bills in the Senate.** He's even bragged about bringing the Senate to a legislative standstill. I'm sick and tired of leaders who won't show up to work for Tennesseans. I'm running for the Senate to make Washington work for Tennessee again. To do that, I need to know which issues matter the most to you and your family, so I know what to fight for on our path to flipping the Senate. [**_So please take a moment to complete our survey and tell me which issues you 'd like to see the Senate address first._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa27f/18d6a294/4b4458ca/26d66c04/4003716596/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190808") | | | [Take the Survey >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa27f/18d6a294/4b4458ca/26d66c04/4003716596/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190808")
---
Thank you,
James

|
---

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: We're building something big, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
This summer, we launched a movement to train and mobilize Democracy Warriors. And this is just the beginning. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa539/34a064cc/182591f1/703ce73/2456348396/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - We've made it our mission to expand and defend democracy, ensuring all eligible voters can access the polls. To deliver the transformational change we need, we can't take a single day for granted. That's why we launched a movement this summer in which we meet people around Georgia, organize supporters, and train folks to become Democracy Warriors. [**Watch our video to see what our team is building.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa539/34a064cc/182591f1/703ce70/2456348396/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/democracywarrior?refcode=IE080819DWS") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa539/34a064cc/182591f1/703ce70/2456348396/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/democracywarrior?refcode=IE080819DWS") Because while voter suppression and gerrymandering undermine the very foundation of our democracy, we know that together we can build an activist network powerful enough to stamp out injustice and endure not just one or two elections but every election. This summer, we've trained nearly 300 Democracy Warriors from 48 different counties at summits across Georgia, equipping them with a deep understanding of local and state power structures, a crash-course in strategic digital and offline communication, and the policy know-how to spot voter suppression in their communities. But this kind of deep organizing takes real resources, and this is just the beginning of our movement to empower local leaders with the tools to make real change. Our grassroots movement for free and fair elections is possible because of people like you, friend. [**Will you chip in today to help us expand this program so that we can build real, lasting power for voting rights from the ground up?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa539/34a064cc/182591f1/703ce70/2456348396/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/democracywarrior?refcode=IE080819DWS") Thanks for all you do,
Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa539/34a064cc/182591f1/703ce70/2456348396/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/democracywarrior?refcode=IE080819DWS")**
---

|

clean_body: This summer, we launched a movement to train and mobilize Democracy Warriors. And this is just the beginning. | "" | | | Friend - We've made it our mission to expand and defend democracy, ensuring all eligible voters can access the polls. To deliver the transformational change we need, we can't take a single day for granted. That's why we launched a movement this summer in which we meet people around Georgia, organize supporters, and train folks to become Democracy Warriors. "" "" Because while voter suppression and gerrymandering undermine the very foundation of our democracy, we know that together we can build an activist network powerful enough to stamp out injustice and endure not just one or two elections but every election. This summer, we've trained nearly 300 Democracy Warriors from 48 different counties at summits across Georgia, equipping them with a deep understanding of local and state power structures, a crash-course in strategic digital and offline communication, and the policy know-how to spot voter suppression in their communities. But this kind of deep organizing takes real resources, and this is just the beginning of our movement to empower local leaders with the tools to make real change. Our grassroots movement for free and fair elections is possible because of people like you, friend. "" Thanks for all you do, Team Fair Fight "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Fair Fight, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight are not tax-deductible. It is something that our country is going to have to come together in a unified way to overcome."**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac94/134673f2/d9ba90a/69967d9b/1693885816/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/daily-show-mfb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_080819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[This is going to take each and every one of us coming together to reject weak leadership that says 'I alone can fix this.'](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac94/134673f2/d9ba90a/69967d9b/1693885816/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/daily-show-mfb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_080819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Wage WATCH (via Conole HQ)
subject: $15 an hour is necessary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | Last month the House made history when they passed legislation to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour by 2025!

This will put more money into the pockets of Central New Yorkers and give folks the dignity of a more reasonable wage for their hard work.

But we must make sure the Senate passes this legislation as well.

[**Right now, we 're taking a stand and urging the Senate to take up this legislation. Tell the Senate: It's time to raise the minimum wage!**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b188/388db0e9/814568e/609afc9b/2051625522/VEsH/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://www.paction.us/raise-the-wage/conole-for-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMERight+now+wersquore+taking+a+st&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1") [SIGN THE PETITION](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b188/388db0e9/814568e/609afc9a/2051625522/VEsE/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://www.paction.us/raise-the-wage/conole-for-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+THE+PETITION&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1") This legislation won't just help Central New Yorkers -- it'll give 34 million Americans a raise.

It'll ensure that our workers have more money to cover basic necessities and help push our economy forward.

[**Be one of the 2,500 supporters we need to sign our petition and tell the Senate to pass the Raise the Wage Act ->**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b188/388db0e9/814568e/609afc99/2051625522/VEsF/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://www.paction.us/raise-the-wage/conole-for-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Be+one+of+the+2500+supporters+we+need+to&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1")

Thanks,

All of us at Conole HQ

|
---|---|---

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b188/388db0e9/814568e/609afc98/2051625522/VEsC/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b188/388db0e9/814568e/609af367/2051625522/VEsD/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1&source=FC_EM_JA_90DO_190808_1_1")**

body:
You're invited! Are you ready for an eventful evening reception with both Governor Eric Holcomb and Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer?... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/youre-invited-goparty-with-governor-holcomb?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| | **You're Invited: **
**Join Governor Holcomb for the G.O.Party! **
Friends,

**You're invited! Are you ready for an exciting evening reception with both Governor Eric Holcomb and Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer? **

Are you ready to join your fellow Republicans at the Dallara IndyCar Factory for light snacks and drinks?

Are you ready to dance to the live music of local band Password Reset?
**[\-- >> Then RSVP now for Team Holcomb's Annual ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=61076ca535&e=1acd9bb3d6)[G.O.Party](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7af468f94b&e=1acd9bb3d6)[! <<\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=62758887cf&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
This big event will take place on Wednesday, August 28th at the Dallara IndyCar Factory in Speedway, Indiana!

By attending, your support helps Governor Holcomb – who just last month officially announced he's running to serve Hoosiers for another four years – and our entire Republican team.

**You do not want to miss this amazing opportunity to spend time with fellow Hoosier Republicans and hang out with Governor Eric Holcomb!**

We're all looking forward to seeing you there, so [RSVP](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=59776460c7&e=1acd9bb3d6) now!

Thanks!
Team Holcomb
